title: PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: BENTON HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered health care. Services include wellness visits, chronic disease management, health screenings, and family planning. Pharmacy and after hour nurse line available for medical, mental, or dental care clients. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-6835 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6835 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. No one turned away because of inability to pay for services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding fee scale. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The Community Health Center is located in the Benton County Health Services building. Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Family Counseling General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BENTON HEALTH CENTER
